name: Order → Notification Integration order creation given new order when created then notification service sends confirmation email
Order → Notification Integration order confirmation given existing order when confirmed then customer receives processing notification
Order → Notification Integration order cancellation given existing order when cancelled then customer receives cancellation notification with reason
Order → Notification Integration MockNotificationSender reset given sent notifications and shouldFail set when reset is called then clears state
Order → Notification Integration notification sender failure given sender failure when order is created then notification is persisted as FAILED status
Order → Notification Integration full order lifecycle given order when progressing through lifecycle then correct notifications are sent at each stage
